items.definition_en: A migraine is a severe headache that often comes with nausea and sensitivity to light.
items.example_en: She had to lie down because of a strong migraine.

items.definition_en: A sprain is an injury to a ligament caused by being stretched too far.
items.example_en: His ankle sprain made it hard to walk.

items.definition_en: A fracture is when a bone is broken or cracked.
items.example_en: She wore a cast because of a wrist fracture.

items.definition_en: An ulcer is a sore that forms on the skin or inside the body.
items.example_en: His stomach ulcer caused a lot of discomfort.

items.definition_en: Eczema is a skin condition that makes the skin red and itchy.
items.example_en: The doctor gave her a cream for eczema.

items.definition_en: Pneumonia is a serious lung infection that makes it hard to breathe.
items.example_en: He was hospitalised with pneumonia.

items.definition_en: Diabetes is a disease that affects how the body uses sugar.
items.example_en: Her diabetes requires daily insulin shots.

items.definition_en: High blood pressure is when the force of blood against the walls of the arteries is too high.
items.example_en: High blood pressure can lead to heart problems.

items.definition_en: A heart attack happens when blood flow to the heart is blocked.
items.example_en: He survived a heart attack last year.

items.definition_en: A stroke is a medical emergency where blood flow to the brain stops.
items.example_en: Quick action is needed if someone is having a stroke.

items.definition_en: Arthritis is a condition that causes pain and swelling in the joints.
items.example_en: Her arthritis makes her hands stiff in the morning.

items.definition_en: A concussion is a brain injury caused by a blow to the head.
items.example_en: The athlete was checked for a concussion after the fall.

items.definition_en: Appendicitis is a serious swelling of the appendix.
items.example_en: He had surgery to treat appendicitis.

items.definition_en: Anemia is a condition where the blood does not have enough healthy red cells.
items.example_en: Tiredness can be a sign of anemia.

items.definition_en: Measles is a highly contagious disease with fever and a red rash.
items.example_en: Children are often vaccinated against measles.

items.definition_en: Chickenpox is a disease causing itchy skin spots and fever.
items.example_en: He missed school because of chickenpox.

items.definition_en: A sinus infection is inflammation in the cavities around the nose.
items.example_en: A sinus infection gave her headaches every day.

items.definition_en: Food poisoning happens when you eat spoiled or contaminated food.
items.example_en: He got food poisoning after eating at a restaurant.

items.definition_en: A hernia happens when an organ pushes through an opening in muscles.
items.example_en: The doctor diagnosed him with a hernia.

items.definition_en: Bronchitis is inflammation of the tubes that carry air to the lungs.
items.example_en: She developed bronchitis after having a cold.
